message:
feat(hooks): add sync command and centralized hook management (gt-pga9m, gt-ja40n.2)

Implement gt hooks sync to generate .claude/settings.json files from
base config + per-role/per-rig overrides. Also adds hooks diff command
and fixes unknown field preservation in settings.json roundtrips.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
